ruleset.name: dct
ruleset.description: This form is used to write News Releases

item.name: related_article_side
item.label: Type of Article:
item.description: If Related Content selected, will be saved to related-content folder

item.name: publish_date
item.label: Publish Date
item.description: Date format is YYYY-MM-DD (save with today date then change to 0000-00-00 before publishing for preview)

item.name: title
item.label: Headline Title (under 70 chars)
item.description: Required: Under 70 chars to abide by SEO guidelines (not exceed this text field box)

item.name: description
item.label: Summary (under 140 chars)
item.description: No HTML syntax is allowed (incl no breaks) 120 (max 140) chars

item.name: secondary_nav
item.label: Secondary Navigation (only if requested)
item.description: Select for campaign episodes etc. (Default: No Navigation. )

item.name: subcategory
item.label: Subcategory Tiles (leave as Insights unless specified)

item.name: breadcrumb_display_text
item.label: Preview Breadcrumb Text
item.description: Autogenerated on form save.

item.name: manual-breadcrumb
item.label: Enter Breadcrumbs manually as - a href inside li without ul, without space between li tag (ONLY if required) (ONLY if required)

item.name: theme
item.label: Content Theme / Series (Technology, Healthcare etc.) (leave empty)

item.name: thumbnail
item.label: Tile/Thumbnail Image (WEBP)
item.description: Required: Tile image on Insights feed (must be 1200x628 .webp)

item.name: banner
item.label: Banner Image (WEBP)
item.description: Required: Banner Image (must be 1920x475 .webp)

item.name: video
item.label: Video Link from Brightcove

item.name: podcast
item.label: Audio/Podcast Link from Captivate full URL
item.description: Optional: Captivate player embed URL

item.name: video-title-order
item.label: Show Banner Video/Podcast Title AFTER Article Title
item.description: Yes, will display Video/Podcast Title AFTER Article Title and BEFORE Summry/Article Description

container.name: podcastlink
container.label: Custom Banner Audio Links (overwrite selection above)

item.name: link
item.label: Podcast Link
item.description: Captivate player embed URL

item.name: keypoints
item.label: Keypoints (MAX three to five include periods . and MAX 215 chars each)

item.name: article_transcript
item.label: Article Transcript
item.description: Put transcript page URL here

item.name: time_to_read
item.label: Time to read (autofill when Content added - X min) (leave blank when saving OR use wordcounter.net)
item.description: Enter time for other options (Whole number round down X min)

item.name: time_to_watch
item.label: Time to Watch or Listen in Banner (X min)

item.name: language
item.label: Language (always English)
item.description: Select the language of this article.

item.name: region
item.label: Region (always Global only)
item.description: Select the region of this article.

item.name: author_heading
item.label: Heading: Custom right side Authors (Defaults: Our experts)

item.name: author_side_hide
item.label: Show Authors on right side or Content section bottom
item.description: Must always be Show on right side.

container.name: author-section
container.label: Author(s)
container.description: Add up to four Authors. Use Update Manually section, if needed.

item.name: title_append_new
item.label: Show company name in the Byline

item.name: author_display_text
item.label: Preview Author Display Text
item.description: Autogenerated on form save.

item.name: author_name_byline
item.label: Manually Update Author Byline 1st line
item.description: To manually update the top Author byline.

item.name: author_title_byline
item.label: Manually Update Author Byline 2nd line
item.description: To manually update the second Author byline.

item.name: guest_heading
item.label: Heading: Custom Featured guests (Default: Featured guest)

item.name: guest_side_hide
item.label: Show Guests on the side or at bottom
item.description: Must always be Show on the side, few exceptions.

container.name: callout
container.label: Customize Right Side Callout Box (usually for series)
container.description: Will auto generate callout box for Markets in Motion article leave empty, fill in below to overwrite

item.name: callout_linktext
item.label: Callout Box Link Text
item.description: defaults to 'Download'

item.name: related-th-image
item.label: Show First Related Content image?
item.description: Default Yes, if NO is selected, it will hide thumbnail image for Related Content section

item.name: story
item.label: Related Content story path - always starts with / (Right Side)

item.name: story-bottom
item.label: Related Content story path - always starts with / (Bottom Below Content section)

item.name: sitelocation
item.label: Location to Feature - *Do not add these until ready to go live* AND Always check these pages after go live
item.description: *Do not add these until ready to go live*

item.name: descriptionmeta
item.label: SEO Description (provided by business)
item.description: Required - use Summary/Description if unavailable

item.name: keywordsmeta
item.label: SEO Keywords (provided by business)
item.description: Required - Comma separated, six to nine keywords only.

item.name: tags
item.label: Additional Tags / Keywords (must add a few from SEO Keywords if not provided)

item.name: platform
item.label: Platform
item.description: net new july 2 field for Conference Insights filter - Which platform this article belongs to.

item.name: topic
item.label: Topic
item.description: net new july 2 field for Conference Insights filter - Check every topic this article covers. Multiple topics allowed — one article can be tagged with e.g. Energy Transition + Financial Institutions. Taxonomy locked in with Joe on July 2; "Topic" is broader than "Industry" so articles about Markets/Economics or Geopolitics fit cleanly.

container.name: associated-conferences
container.label: Associated Conference / Event
container.description: net new july 2 field for Conference Insights filter - Pick the conference(s) this article covers from the existing upcoming-conferences data (browse into templatedata/about-us/conferences/data). Up to 3, for articles that cross multiple events. Bidirectional link: each conference's page can show articles that reference it.

item.name: regional_origination
item.label: Regional Origination
item.description: net new july 2 field for Conference Insights filter - Where the article was written / originated.

item.name: regional_relevancy
item.label: Regional Relevancy
item.description: net new july 2 field for Conference Insights filter - Which region the article is relevant to (target audience).
